title: BlazeCraft - Builder's Paradise
description: A modpack made for creative mode building, but with an added coat of paint to make survival fresh and new.
body:
![Custom starting menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d9a9243cb9fec9ea89ecee79e95b4cc589004ab_0.webp)
# BlazeCraft - Builder's Paradise
  Welcome to BlazeCraft - Builder's Paradise! This is a 1.20.1 fabric Modpack focused on creative mode building, but adds an extra coat of paint to survival mode, making it a fresh and fun experience. If you have wanted to build with many of the mods included but less pressure on survival, this is for you! If you want a pack that gives you something new to explore even after you have finished a run through, this is also for you!

### Features

- Decor and blocks galore!
- More and Improved structures
- More Archeology (more plants for sniffers to find)
- More Biomes to explore
- More plants and critters
- New biomes await in the worlds depths
- Performance mods to help things run more smoothly than otherwise

### Resource Packs:

- Biomes O'Plenty Renewed
- Cubic Sun & Moon
- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Moves
- Simple Grass Flowers
- xali's Enchanted Books
- xali's Enchanted Books - Addon
- xali's Enchanted Books - Fix
- xali's Enhanced Vanilla
- xali's Potions
- xali's Potions - Addon

### Shaders:

Complimentary Shaders (+ Euphoria Patches)

### Notes:
- 8G of RAM is recommended if running with shaders
- If you like to build in singular biomes - Large biome + Better X world generation is recommended

###  Disclaimer: This pack is in its beginning stages and has been made by someone who may not be able to fix major game-breaking bugs without simply removing mods. This pack is not likely to be up kept for long stretches of time, as this is simply a personal project.
